lines.text: Ugh! I can't believe I led my team into total annihilation again...!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: That means the list of people I need revenge on is now... one, two... twenty-six... seventy-eight...
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: ARGHHH! I've already lost to seventy-eight people in Peaks of Prestige!?
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Just you wait! Once I defeat the other seventy-seven... your turn will come!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
